visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women are positioned in front of a giant inflatable Minion character inside a spacious Costco warehouse. The woman on the left wears a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white lace top, smiling while gesturing towards the Minion. The woman on the right wears a black beret and a dark sheer top, holding a Super Mario themed costume box. The background is filled with industrial warehouse shelving, toy boxes, and bright fluorescent lighting. A large red and blue Costco logo is overlaid at the top. (2) The camera maintains a medium shot as the women interact with product boxes. The woman on the left picks up a Minecraft Pig box, pointing at the illustration of a child riding a pink pig. Both maintain high-energy facial expressions, smiling at each other and the camera. Yellow and white text overlays with heart icons appear dynamically. (3) A series of close-up shots show physical properties of the inflatable Minion. Hands press into the soft grey fabric of the legs and point out a small black plastic fan unit embedded in the side. Later, the camera focuses on an Enderman Minecraft box. Text subtitles continue to scroll at the bottom. (4) The woman in the black beret is shown in a close-up, looking at measurements on the back of the Mario box with a mock-disappointed expression. People with shopping carts move in the background. The camera work is slightly shaky, indicating handheld filming. The video ends with the women laughing.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 超可愛的巨大小小兵. (2) [Slogan]: 穿身上899元. [Variety]: 充氣人偶裝. (3) [Subtitle]: 然後如果你是大人的話. [Subtitle]: 你可以選擇騎恐龍或者是. (4) [Variety]: 野豬騎士來啦~. (5) [Subtitle]: 這個是耀西. [Subtitle]: 就是你當耀西我當馬力歐. [Subtitle]: 你說兩人辦一個一組這樣子啊. (6) [Subtitle]: 但是我覺得套豬豬真的也很可愛耶. [Subtitle]: 如果是小朋友的尺寸你就可以進去. (7) [Subtitle]: 它後面有拉鍊然後手是軟軟的. [Subtitle]: 可以從這裡進去哇嗚~. [Subtitle]: 我覺得很有趣. (8) [Subtitle]: 這個我沒辦法穿它胸圍只有到74. [Subtitle]: 所以大家還是要看一下尺寸哦. (9) [Subtitle]: 所以只有我能穿. [Subtitle]: 不對啊它高度只有136. [Subtitle]: 這小朋友的啦你們兩個. [Subtitle]: 我可以把自己對折啊. [Subtitle]: 我也要當小孩.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 3 shoppers visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One female wearing a patterned bucket hat and white top; another female wearing a black beret and dark sheer blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving units stacked with toys, and wide concrete aisles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female voices speaking Traditional Chinese dominate the mix, accompanied by a bouncy, rhythmic electronic BGM with synth leads. The tone is cheerful and high-arousal. Short 'ding' and 'pop' SFX appear frequently, marking visual text transitions. (2) A male voice interrupts with a dramatic meme-inspired shout ('野豬騎士來啦~'), briefly ducking the music and other voices. The BGM tempo remains steady. The female voices resume immediately after, maintaining a fast speech rate and playful intonation. (3) The audio shifts into a more conversational interplay between the two females and a secondary male voice in the background. Their voices overlap with the BGM. The track ends with a cluster of laughter and bright melodic synth notes.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Showcase -> Sizing Check -> Humor
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and recommend humorous inflatable costumes available at Costco, using a high-energy vlog format to engage viewers with product details and sizing advice.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of prices and product features within a specific retail environment.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging, social-media native retail vlog featuring high text density and energetic editing.
